Appearances:
Plaintiff Urbano Borick is present.
Attorney Aleksandr Volkov for the plaintiff.
Defendants Arnetta Butler and Romeikus Moore are present.
Attorney Josephine Alioto appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions. This case did not settle. The trial date of May 23, 2016 remains on calendar. (D501)
